title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with tender lamb and flavorful Irish spices. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Dust the lamb cubes with flour, shaking off excess.
Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown the lamb on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium. Add more oil if necessary, then sauté the chopped onion until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the browned lamb, Irish stew seasoning, red wine, and water to the pot.
Bring to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2-3 hours, or until the lamb is tender and the vegetables are cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
